name: Full Deploy → Delete Cluster → Redeploy
description: Runs a complete one-shot deploy to success, deletes the Kind cluster while keeping local config, then verifies a subsequent redeploy recreates the cluster and succeeds

name: Full Deploy → Delete Local Config → Redeploy
description: Runs a complete one-shot deploy to success, deletes ~/.solo while keeping the cluster running, then verifies a subsequent redeploy restores local config from remote and skips already-deployed steps
